title: CorsRule
description: CORS rule for the Blob service.

AllowedOrigins.description: Comma-separated list of origin domains that are allowed via CORS.

AllowedMethods.description: Comma-separated list of HTTP methods that are allowed. Options are DELETE, GET, HEAD, MERGE, POST, OPTIONS, PUT.

AllowedHeaders.description: Comma-separated list of headers allowed to be part of the cross-origin request.

ExposedHeaders.description: Comma-separated list of response headers to expose to CORS clients.

MaxAgeInSeconds.description: The maximum amount of time in seconds that a browser should cache the preflight OPTIONS request.
